privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for FreeScout helpdesk system. The task requires creating an email conversation with: mailbox 'AV Support', customer 'prof.martinez@lakewood-univ.edu', CC recipients 'deptchair.wilson@lakewood-univ.edu' and 'facilities@lakewood-univ.edu', subject 'Projector Maintenance Request - Room 301 Anderson Hall', and body containing keywords 'Room 301', 'Anderson Hall', 'HDMI', and 'inspection'. All data is hardcoded in the task definition and setup scripts; no external data sources are used.
